---
title: "prep_midterm"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# tutorial3
test using git command in terminal

# Tutorial 4: Figures, Tables, and Cross-Referencing
## Task 1: Working with Figures
```{r}
#| label: fig-penguins-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Body mass vs Flipper length for three penguin species"
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)
library(palmerpenguins)

ggplot(penguins, aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = body_mass_g, color = species)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()
```
@fig-penguins-scatter shows the relationship between Body mass vs Flipper length for three penguin species.
